note: AUTOGENERATED by site/tools/gen-ontology-catalog.js from the verified Rust cell-program source. Do not edit by hand — regenerate.

cell_program_kinds.semantics: No program — any authorized state change is valid (current behavior).
Predicate program: a set of conditions that must hold after transition.
Circuit program: an AIR/R1CS circuit that defines the valid state transition function.

transition_guards.semantics: Always matches; the case's constraints apply to every transition.
Match when the action's method symbol equals `method` (the 32-byte BLAKE3 hash of the method name).
Match when the action carries an effect whose `effect_kind_mask()` intersects `mask` (i.e.
Match when `new_state[index] != old_state[index]` (slot `index` changed during this transition).
Disjunction — match if any child matches.
Conjunction — match if every child matches.

constraints.name: FieldEquals
constraints.semantics: Field at index must equal value.

constraints.name: FieldGte
constraints.semantics: Field at index must be >= value (unsigned big-endian comparison).

constraints.name: FieldLte
constraints.semantics: Field at index must be <= value (unsigned big-endian comparison).

constraints.name: FieldLteField
constraints.semantics: Field at `left_index` must be <= field at `right_index` in the same post-state.

constraints.name: FieldLteOther
constraints.semantics: Field at `index` must be `<= field at `other` + delta` in the same post-state (`new[index] <= new[other] + delta`, signed).

constraints.name: SumEquals
constraints.semantics: Sum of fields at indices must equal value (intra-cell conservation).

constraints.name: WriteOnce
constraints.semantics: Slot must transition only from `FIELD_ZERO` to any non-zero value; after the first write, the slot is frozen.

constraints.name: Immutable
constraints.semantics: Slot value is read-only after initialization.

constraints.name: Monotonic
constraints.semantics: `new[i] >= old[i]` (unsigned big-endian).

constraints.name: StrictMonotonic
constraints.semantics: `new[i] > old[i]` strictly.

constraints.name: BoundedBy
constraints.semantics: `slot[index]` may only be set (i.e.

constraints.name: FieldDelta
constraints.semantics: `new[index] == old[index] + delta` (modular field arithmetic).

constraints.name: FieldDeltaInRange
constraints.semantics: `new[index] in [old[index] + min_delta, old[index] + max_delta]`.

constraints.name: FieldGteHeight
constraints.semantics: `new[index] >= ctx.block_height + offset`.

constraints.name: FieldLteHeight
constraints.semantics: `new[index] <= ctx.block_height + offset`.

constraints.name: SumEqualsAcross
constraints.semantics: Intra-cell conservation across the transition: `sum(new[input_fields]) == sum(old[input_fields]) + sum(new[output_fields])`.

constraints.name: SenderAuthorized
constraints.semantics: The turn's sender must be in an authorized set.

constraints.name: CapabilityUniqueness
constraints.semantics: `slot[cap_set_root_slot]` is a per-cell capability-set root and must encode at most one live capability of the named kind.

constraints.name: RateLimit
constraints.semantics: Sender may mutate this cell at most `max_per_epoch` times per `epoch_duration` blocks.

constraints.name: RateLimitBySum
constraints.semantics: Sum-based rate limit: the *value* added to `slot_index` over a window of `epoch_duration` blocks cannot exceed `max_sum_per_epoch`.

constraints.name: TemporalGate
constraints.semantics: Mutation is rejected unless `ctx.block_height` is in `[not_before, not_after]`.

constraints.name: PreimageGate
constraints.semantics: The action must reveal a preimage whose hash equals `slot[commitment_index]`.

constraints.name: MonotonicSequence
constraints.semantics: `slot[seq_index] == old[seq_index] + 1`.

constraints.name: AllowedTransitions
constraints.semantics: `(old[slot_index], new[slot_index])` must appear in the explicit allow-list `allowed`.

constraints.name: TemporalPredicate
constraints.semantics: Witness-attached temporal-predicate proof.

constraints.name: BoundDelta
constraints.semantics: Cross-cell binding pair to γ.2: this cell's `local_slot` delta must match `peer_cell`'s `peer_slot` delta under the named `DeltaRelation`.

constraints.name: AnyOf
constraints.semantics: Single-level disjunction: at least one of `variants` must hold.

constraints.name: Witnessed
constraints.semantics: A witness-attached predicate (DFA classification, temporal-DSL proof, blinded-set non-revocation, bridge predicate, custom AIR…).

constraints.name: Renounced
constraints.semantics: **Categorical dual of `SenderAuthorized`: proof of non-holding / non-membership.** A *renunciation* slot caveat — the action's sender must verifiably *NOT* be in the `set`'s sorted Merkle leaf set.

constraints.name: MemberOf
constraints.semantics: **Value allowlist:** `new[index]` must be one of `set` (the one-sided value membership the pair-table `AllowedTransitions` cannot express).

constraints.name: PrefixOf
constraints.semantics: **Namespace / path prefix containment:** the ordered scalar path read from `seg_indices` (each a slot read as big-endian u64) must START WITH `prefix`.

constraints.name: InRangeTwoSided
constraints.semantics: **Two-sided absolute band:** `lo <= new[index] <= hi` (the ABSOLUTE counterpart to the RELATIVE `FieldDeltaInRange`).

constraints.name: DeltaBounded
constraints.semantics: **Real two-sided delta:** `|new[index] - old[index]| <= d` (symmetric; the legacy delta variants are one-sided or relative-range).

constraints.name: AffineLe
constraints.semantics: **Affine inequality:** `Σ kᵢ·new[fᵢ] <= c` over named slots (`terms : Vec<(i64 coefficient, u8 slot)>`).

constraints.name: AffineEq
constraints.semantics: **Affine equation:** `Σ kᵢ·new[fᵢ] = c`.

constraints.name: Reachable
constraints.semantics: **DAG reachability / prerequisite:** the label read from `new[from_index]` must reach `to_label` in the reachability `edges` (reflexive-transitive closure).

constraints.name: AllOf
constraints.semantics: **n-ary conjunction** over `SimpleStateConstraint`s — the `allOf` the legacy 2-level grammar lacked (it had only single-level `AnyOf`).

constraints.name: Custom
constraints.semantics: DSL-authored predicate.

constraints.name: SenderIs
constraints.semantics: The turn's sender (acting cell's public key) must equal `pk`.

constraints.name: SenderInSlot
constraints.semantics: The turn's sender must equal the identity held in `new[index]`.

constraints.name: BalanceGte
constraints.semantics: The cell's own post-turn balance must be `>= min`.

constraints.name: BalanceLte
constraints.semantics: The cell's own post-turn balance must be `<= max`.

constraints.name: KeyRotationGate
constraints.semantics: **Pre-rotation gate (KERI-shaped)** — the identity rider (`docs/ORGANS.md` "Identity rider"; kernel semantics proven in `metatheory/Dregg2/Apps/PreRotation.lean`, the `rotateWriteCooled` production shape).

constraints.name: HeapField
constraints.semantics: **Heap-keyed atom (THE ROTATION's app-state lane)** — the top-level lift of `HeapAtom` over heap key `key`, the twin of `HeapField` (both surfaces share ONE evaluator arm, like the `SenderIs`/`BalanceGte` precedent).

constraints.name: DelegationEpochEquals
constraints.semantics: `new[index]` must equal the touched cell's post-turn `delegation_epoch`.

constraints.name: CountGe
constraints.semantics: The witness must exhibit ≥ `threshold` distinct elements opening the commitment in `new[set_commitment_slot]`.

constraints.name: SenderMemberOf
constraints.semantics: The turn's sender must be one of `members`.

constraints.name: BalanceDeltaLte
constraints.semantics: The cell's per-turn balance change is `<= max`.

constraints.name: BalanceDeltaGte
constraints.semantics: The cell's per-turn balance change is `>= min`.

constraints.name: AffineDeltaLe
constraints.semantics: **Multi-field delta gate:** `Σ kᵢ·(new[fᵢ] − old[fᵢ]) <= c` over named slots (`terms : Vec<(i64 coefficient, u8 slot)>`).

constraints.name: ObservedFieldEquals
constraints.semantics: **Cross-cell verified observation** (`docs/CELL-PROGRAM-LANGUAGE.md` §11.2): `new[local_field]` must equal the value `source_field` held by the PEER cell `source_cell` at the FINALIZED state-commitment root `at_root`.

constraints.name: CollectionAggregate
constraints.semantics: **Aggregate-over-a-collection gate** (`docs/CELL-PROGRAM-LANGUAGE.md` gaps 7/11.1 — the heap/layout rung, the documented "lamesauce" N≤3 fixed-slot cap *lifted*).

constraints.name: AnyOfBound
constraints.semantics: **Witnessed branches under disjunction** (`docs/CELL-PROGRAM-LANGUAGE.md` §11.3 — the `AnyOfBound` rung) — admits IFF SOME `branches` element admits.

constraints.name: SymEq
constraints.semantics: **`SymEq`** — `field_to_u64(new[index]) == sym`: the field's interned identity (the u64 lane) equals `sym`.

constraints.name: SymMemberOf
constraints.semantics: **`SymMemberOf`** — `field_to_u64(new[index]) ∈ set`: enum membership by the symbol lane ("`status ∈ {Draft, Active, Frozen}`").

constraints.name: DigEq
constraints.semantics: **`DigEq`** — `new[index] == digest` as a FULL 32-byte field: the field's digest / cell-reference equals `digest`.

constraints.name: DigFieldEq
constraints.semantics: **`DigFieldEq`** — `new[left_index] == new[right_index]` as FULL 32-byte fields: two digest slots are equal.

expressibility_limits: The cell `balance` is sealed (not one of the 16 slots), so "resolve drains the full balance" and "the payout goes to the published counterparty" are NOT program-enforced; they are enforced by the SDK builders (`dregg_sdk::factories`) constructing the only sensible turn, and by the kernel move law (a `Transfer` conserves and fail-closes). This mirrors the Lean contracts, where the settle target is an argument of `escrowRelease`/`obSettle` rather than a checked field.

The committed-escrow knowledge gate (release on a HASH-PREIMAGE reveal) is now EXPRESSIBLE: `PreimageGate` is a `SimpleStateConstraint` (`docs/CELL-PROGRAM-LANGUAGE.md` §4), so `when_state(RESOLVED_A, PreimageGate { commitment_index: CONDITION_SLOT, .. })` composes — see `cell::program::tests::preimage_gate_composes_under_state_guard` and the Lean `committedRelease` twin (`Dregg2/Exec/Program.lean`). The cleartext witness-equality gate below remains the Lean `EscrowFactory` contract; a committed-deal blueprint is the natural next variant.

The "resolve drains the full balance" tooth is likewise now expressible (`BalanceLte { max: 0 }` under the terminal-state guards — the `balance_atoms_see_own_balance` pin). The published settlement blueprints keep the Lean-twin constraint set verbatim; adding the drain tooth is a descriptor evolution to land together with its Lean keystone (one semantics, both sides — see `docs/CELL-PROGRAM-LANGUAGE.md` §9).
